generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor capturing real-time environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor capturing real-time environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor capturing real-time building occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data stream from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with semantic device metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems based on DT commands"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC systems executing DT commands"
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure represented as a Living Lab case study"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and automated data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsForEnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and data normalization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsForEnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of facility management"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated artifact generation and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsForEnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsForEnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveEnergyOptimizationInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectConsiderationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment service using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingAdjustmentAction, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization for facility management using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance BIMModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for validating BIM models during twinning process"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelValidationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for building performance under various scenarios"
]

instance PredictiveEnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy consumption patterns for optimization"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectConsiderationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Considerations for non-visual health effects in facility management"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of building operations for management"
]

instance BIMModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results ensuring BIM model accuracy for twin representation"
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC systems based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT's analytics services, sent via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers within the Building Control Systems (BCS) to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twin through continuous data exchange, with no specific time intervals specified beyond live updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT Framework hub orchestrating BIM-based models, Hono/Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the complete building life cycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, with attention to semantic coherence to prevent drift between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time bidirectional communication, leveraging IoT protocols for device connectivity and digital twin state synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of DT artifacts using Eclipse Hono and Ditto infrastructure, with no specific hosting environment details provided beyond the framework's modular architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enabling integration with external systems and services through modular service-oriented architecture, though specific external systems are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for semantic representation and standardized extension points for interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
